cross_scene_arcs.title: From Cynicism to Moral Awakening
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Babe transitions from a manipulative reporter using deception for career gain to someone increasingly troubled by her role in exploiting Longfellow, culminating in her resignation and rejection of journalistic cynicism.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Babe uses tricks and manipulation to regain editorial leverage and secure personal benefits.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Babe resigns from the newspaper, rejecting her former professional identity and alliances.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether she can fully leave behind her past role and find a new purpose.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deception and Emotional Transformation in Relationship with Longfellow
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Babe initiates a relationship with Longfellow through calculated deception but gradually develops genuine emotional connection, leading to public confession of love and romantic reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Babe fakes vulnerability to manipulate Longfellow and gain access to his world.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Babe publicly admits her love for Longfellow and is reciprocated with a passionate reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how their relationship will navigate the aftermath of her betrayal and public scrutiny.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Struggle with Professional Identity and Story Integrity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Babe secures a front-page story promise based on exploiting Longfellow, but becomes unable to write it due to moral conflict, ultimately abandoning her journalism career.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Babe promises Mac a sensational front-page story in exchange for a paid vacation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Babe resigns from the paper, unable and unwilling to complete the article.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether she will ever produce a story true to both her integrity and her skills.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Human Cost of Exploitation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Babe faces the emotional consequences of her actions when she learns her presence harms Deeds and publicly admits her role in defaming Longfellow under pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Babe is forced to acknowledge her authorship of defamatory articles in court.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Babe learns her name causes distress to Deeds, revealing the personal damage caused by media exploitation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether she can repair the harm she has caused to those she misrepresented.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Execution of Inheritance Delivery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John Cedar initiates and completes the formal process of locating and informing Longfellow Deeds of his inheritance, from arrival in Mandrake Falls to the delivery of the $20 million news in Deeds' home.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar arrives in Mandrake Falls as an outsider beginning inquiry into Deeds' whereabouts.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar completes notification of inheritance but is unsettled by Deeds' calm, detached reaction.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Deeds' unemotional response raises doubts about his understanding or readiness to manage the fortune.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shift from Legal Authority to Adversarial Campaign
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cedar transitions from a position of professional authority delivering legal news to leading an aggressive legal campaign to declare Deeds incompetent, ultimately losing control and credibility in court.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar holds formal authority as the legal messenger who delivered the inheritance news.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar is discredited and isolated after the court dismisses the case against Deeds.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His professional standing and future influence remain uncertain after public defeat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Strategic Alliance with Semple Relatives
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cedar shifts from dismissing the Semple relatives to actively engaging them as allies after recognizing their 'nuisance value,' culminating in pressuring Semple to sign legal documents to challenge Deeds.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar initially ignores or dismisses the Semple relatives' claims.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar formalizes a legal alliance with Semple, initiating actions to discredit Deeds.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The alliance's effectiveness is undermined by ongoing public support for Deeds.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Collapse of Legal Case in Courtroom
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cedar's courtroom strategy to prove Deeds' incompetence unravels as key witness Babe Bennett discredits the evidence, public sentiment turns, and the case collapses.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar leads the hearing with organized evidence and no defense from Deeds.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar's case is dismantled, culminating in the court dismissing the proceedings and Deeds being declared sane.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The legal and reputational consequences of the failed case remain unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Inheritance and Moral Responsibility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow transitions from passive heir to active moral agent, rejecting personal gain and insisting the inheritance serve others, culminating in a public defense of his philanthropic plan and legal vindication.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally unfazed by sudden wealth, questioning why he was chosen
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: officially recognized as sane and celebrated for his commitment to helping others

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Small-Town Simplicity to National Symbol
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow moves from quiet life in Mandrake Falls to national prominence, evolving from an anxious newcomer to a folk hero who embodies democratic ideals and compassionate leadership.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: nervous about leaving Mandrake Falls for the first time
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: elevated to folk hero status by farmers and crowd

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Babe: Betrayal and Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow's relationship with Babe evolves from mutual skepticism to emotional connection, is shattered by her betrayal, and ultimately restored through public vindication and personal reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Babe refrains from mocking him, marking a shift from skepticism to respect
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: romantic bond with Babe reaffirmed through reunion and passionate kiss

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rejection of Elite Corruption and Hypocrisy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow increasingly resists the moral and financial corruption of the elite, from refusing to subsidize the opera to confronting Cedar in court, asserting his integrity against institutional deceit.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: exits board meeting, distancing himself from the board's approach
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: gains rhetorical control of the courtroom and physically confronts Cedar
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether the court will interpret his outburst as justified outrage or madness
